titleStmt.title: SII 38.120: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 120. (A.R. No. 120 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records that a dancing girl (padiyilār) Ulagelamēttaniṉrār alias Tiruvoṟṟiyūr Ammai, supplicated the king to donate a village in order to defray the expenses for providing a palanquin (Tiruvāḍu taṇḍu) so that the deity Vyākarṇadānapperumāḷ could be taken on procession and also for the institution of a service called Tribhuvanavīran-sandhi (evidently for the merit of the king) in the temple. The king instructed Nuḷambarāyar of Pariśai to provide for these charities. The latter ceded in his (King's) twenty seventh regnal year and four hundred and twenty seventh day, with its proceeds of gold weighing 510(3/4) kaḻañju excluding the wastage due to the melting (sēdāram), a palanquin and two anklets (tiruppāḍagam) were made and also the village Kuḷappākkam alias Śivapādasēkaranallūr in Kulottuṅgachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam.

She made a subsequent request to the king in his twenty seventh regnal year to provide for a palanquin to the deity (Perumāḷ), (as the earlier gifts were made to the goddess (Periyanāchchiyār), the king asked Kaḷappāḷār of Pariśai to provide for the same. The latter in turn, donated a palanquin weighing 870 kaḻañju of gold, and also ornaments, Tiruchchūṭṭu weighing 11(1/2) kaḻañju, two siḍukku weighing 6(1/2) kaḻañju, and two anklets weighing 5(1/4) kaḻañju of gold.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiribhuvaṉacakkaravattikaThere is a small stroke on the letter ka like ki. This may be iṅnored.ḷ virābhiṣekamum vijayābhiṣekamum paṇṇi Aruḷiya tiribhuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 6vatu patiyilāril Ulakelāmetta niṉṟārāṉa tiruvoṟṟiyūrammai Ulakuṭaiyanāyaṉārait tiruvaṭittoḻutu viyākaraṇatāṉap perumāḷeḻuntaruḷi Aruḷat tiruvāṭutaṇṭu camaittut tantaruḷi tiripuvaṉaviraṉcanti Amutu cey
taruḷa Ūr tantaruḷaveṇumeṉṟu viṇṇappañ ceyyap paricaikiḻār nuḷamparāyarai Aḻaittaruḷi Ippaṭi ceytu kuṭukkaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷi Ivarkaḷ kāṇiyoṭuñ ceytu vantu 2 10 7vatu ṉāḷ 4 100 2 10 7ṉāl śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkuḷ tiruvāṭu taṇṭonṟiṉāl Eṭṭu māṟi pon Aiññūṟṟu patiṉkaḻaiñcum cetāran taṇṭi vanta po
n Eṇkaḻañce kāliṉāl taṇṭai Eḻutaṟivāṉum kampaṉum ceyta tiruppāṭakam Iraṇṭum tiripuvaṉaviraṉcanti Amutu ceytaruḷip puliyūrkoṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu kuḷappākkamāṉa civapātacekaranallūrum piṉpu tiruvoṟṟiyūrammai Ittevarai 2 10 7vatu nāḷil tiruvaṭittoḻutu
muṉpu ceytu tantaruḷiṉa tiruvāṭu taṇṭu periyanācciyār Eḻuntaruḷi Aruḷakkuṭuttaruḷittu perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi Aruḷak Innam tiruvāṭu taṇṭu ceytu tantaruḷaveṇumeṉṟu viṇṇappañ ceyya Ipparicaikiḻār kaḷappāḷarai Aḻaittaruḷi Ippaṭi ceytu kuṭukka veṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷap puṟappaṭṭa poṉāle Oṭṭa vaittu neyta
poṉṉāl ceytaru ṇṭu Onṟuṉāl pon Eṇṇūṟṟeḻupatiṉ kaḻaiñcum tiruccūṭṭu Onṟiṉāl pon patiṉoru kaḻaiñcaiyum ciṭukku Iraṇṭuṉāl pon Āṟu kaḻaiñcaraiyum tiruppāṭakam Iraṇṭuṉāl pon Aiyṅkaḻaiñce kālum cetāram taṇṭivantu śrī paṇṭārattu pukunta pon
Digital edition of SII 38.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
